text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. One of its main tasks is image recognition, where computers identify objects, people, or scenes in photos. A more advanced technique is object detection, which not only recognizes objects but also locates them within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps vehicles detect traffic lights, pedestrians, and other vehicles to navigate safely. It is also used in healthcare for medical imaging and in smartphones for facial recognition.
